text:
Dispel (lit. , rom. Penetorēto) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It reverts all the transformed cards in the possession of a target player to their original form.
__NOTOC__

!Card Effect:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Return all cards from target player transformed with “Fake”, “Clone”, or “Mimic” to original form. Destroy all cards that, as a result, find themselves in the wrong imposed slots. “Fake”, “Clone”, and “Mimic” have no effect on “Dispel”.
|
|-
!How to Obtain:
| colspan="3" align="center" |Purchasable at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora.
|
|}

Summary

This spell allows the caster to revert all the cards in a target's possession that have been altered with "Clone", "Fake", or "Mimic". In most cases, this destroys all of the transformed copies since the original cards are now positioned in incorrect designated slots. None of the three above mentioned spells can be used on "Dispel".

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1024 :: 
対象プレイヤー１名の「贋作」「複製」「擬態」によって変化したカードを全て元に戻す。その結果、指定ポケットに入っている番号違いのカードは全て破壊される。「看破」は「贋作」「複製」「擬態」の対象にならない。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1024 :: Dispel 
All of the named target player's cards transformed with “Fake”, “Clone”, and “Mimic” are returned to their original state. As a result, all Designated Pocket cards with a different number are all destroyed. “Dispel” cannot be targeted by “Fake”, “Clone”, or “Mimic”.
|}

Trivia

It was not mentioned what would happen should a reverted card have already reached its conversion limit. It is possible that "Dispel" has a similar side effect to "Purify", causing the reverted cards to be converted into items, to activate them, or to destroy them if neither option is viable.
